## Summary

## Trust & Content Review
- [ ] Official links/source references updated or unchanged intentionally
- [ ] Guide freshness/review status considered

## Privacy & Security
- [ ] No sensitive data added to analytics or logs
- [ ] File/document handling reviewed if touched

## Offline Sync
- [ ] Local persistence and remote sync behavior considered
- [ ] Migration path added if persisted shape changed

## Verification
- [ ] `npm run verify`
- [ ] `npm run smoke:web`
- [ ] `npm run audit:high`
- [ ] `npx expo-doctor`
